pam.note: DOES NOT expand PAM. Same TTTV as WT AsCas12a. M537R/F870L identified by directed evolution — different mutation set from enAsCas12a (no S542R).

seed.note: Retains WT specificity profile (Spec-seq/SEAM-seq confirmed). Positions 1-7 strongest. Unlike enAsCas12a, does NOT show reduced specificity.

kinetics.note: 4× higher activity than WT (EC50 19 nM vs not reported for WT). 84-fold allele discrimination at single-mismatch site. NO published trans-cleavage constants.

temperature.low_temp_performance: Functional at 30°C — outperforms both WT variants at low temperature

references.data: Discovery, directed evolution, EC50, allele discrimination, Spec-seq/SEAM-seq specificity
Commercially available as Alt-R A.s. Cas12a Ultra V3
